body_txt: When a character is acknowledged as being faster than everyone else. Super-Speed is almost always a given, while likely being The Speedster . Compare World's Strongest Man for the strength equivalent, World's Best Warrior for combat in general, World's Smartest Man for the intellectual equivalent, Nigh-Invulnerability and/or Complete Immortality for toughness and Fastest Gun in the West for attack speed with guns.
